attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DISTINCT  
  NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
  NRT.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  NRT.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY,
  NRT.BK_COMPANY_CD,
  NRT.DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE,
  NRT.ELEMENT_TYPE_CD,
  NRT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  NRT.GL_DT,
  NRT.GL_POSTED_DT,
  NRT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE, 
  NRT.PRODUCT_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
  NRT.RTE_DEAL_ID,
  NRT.RTE_SOURCE_TYPE,
  NRT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
  NRT.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
  NRT.TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD,
  NRT.TRX_FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONV_DT, 
  NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT,
  NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT,
  NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT,
  NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT,
  NRT.RU_MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD,
  NRT.RU_RTE_CONTRACT_NUM,
  NRT.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_DRTN_CNT,
  NRT.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
  NRT.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
  NRT.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
    /*NRT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, commented for Q1FY15 RTE by sabanil */
    CASE WHEN NRT.ATTRBTN_CD='STANDALONE' THEN NRT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE NRT.DV_ATTRBTN_PRNT_SLSORD_LN_KEY
    END,/*added as a part of  Q1FY15 RTE by sabanil */
 NRT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_RT WI
  ON (WI.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY) 
  WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_TRX_RT NCR 
  WHERE NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)

SELECT
  WNRTC.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
  NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AS LINE_ID, 
  NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS ORDER_NUMBER
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_RT WNRTC
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
  ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WNRTC.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
  ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
WHERE WNRTC.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'ERP'  
UNION ALL
SELECT
  WNRTC.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
  -9999 AS LINE_ID, 
  -9999 AS ORDER_NUMBER
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_RT WNRTC
WHERE WNRTC.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'XAAS'

SELECT 
 NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
 UPPER(NRT.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD),
 NAT.AR_TRX_KEY,
 NRT.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY   AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 NRT.BK_COMPANY_CD,
 NRT.DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE,
 NRT.ELEMENT_TYPE_CD,
 NRT3.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 NRT.GL_DT,
 NRT.GL_POSTED_DT,
 NRT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE, 
 NRT.PRODUCT_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
 NRT.RTE_DEAL_ID,
 NRT.RTE_SOURCE_TYPE,
 NRT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
 NRT.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 NRT.TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD,
 NRT.TRX_FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONV_DT, 
 (NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT-NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 (NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT-NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT) AS AMOUNT,
 NRT.RU_MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD,
 NRT.RU_RTE_CONTRACT_NUM,
 NRT.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_DRTN_CNT,
 NRT.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
 NRT.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
 NRT.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
 /* Q1FY17 RTE XAAS*/
 CASE WHEN NRT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'ERP' THEN CASE WHEN NRT.ATTRBTN_CD='STANDALONE' THEN NRT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE NRT.DV_ATTRBTN_PRNT_SLSORD_LN_KEY END
 ELSE -7777 END,/*added as a part of  Q1FY15 RTE by sabanil */
 NULL AS  CONTEXT,
 EAMPD.FISCAL_ID,
 NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
 EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID,
 NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE,
 NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER,
 NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
 ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
 ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT     AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
 NRT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD
  FROM
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON NRT.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT                           
     ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
     ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NRT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
     ON  NRT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
 INNER JOIN  (SELECT EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT2 
               WHERE ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' 
               QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ORDER BY REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)=1) NRT3
 ON NRT.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NRT3.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
                  ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NRT3.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   WHERE NRT.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
   AND NRT.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE_ADJ'
  AND NRT.GL_DT  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  AND  NOT EXISTS 
                   (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR
 WHERE  DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
  AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RTE_INV' )
   AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
   WHERE DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RTE_INV') 
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
 EXNRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
 UPPER(EXNRT.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD),
 NAT.AR_TRX_KEY,
 EXNRT.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY,
 EXNRT.BK_COMPANY_CD,
 EXNRT.DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE,
 EXNRT.ELEMENT_TYPE_CD,
 NRT3.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 EXNRT.GL_DT,
 EXNRT.GL_POSTED_DT,
 EXNRT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE, 
 EXNRT.PRODUCT_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
 EXNRT.RTE_DEAL_ID,
 EXNRT.RTE_SOURCE_TYPE,
 EXNRT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
 EXNRT.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 EXNRT.TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD,
 EXNRT.TRX_FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONV_DT, 
 (EXNRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT-EXNRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 (EXNRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT-EXNRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT) AS AMOUNT,
 EXNRT.RU_MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD,
 EXNRT.RU_RTE_CONTRACT_NUM,
 EXNRT.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_DRTN_CNT,
 EXNRT.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
 EXNRT.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
 EXNRT.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
 CASE WHEN EXNRT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'ERP' THEN EXNRT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE -7777 END,/* Q1FY17 RTE XAAS*/
 NULL AS  CONTEXT,
 EAMPD.FISCAL_ID,
 NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
 EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID,
 NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE,
 NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER,
 NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
 ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
 ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT     AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
 EXNRT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD
 FROM
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
  $$EXCEPDB.EX_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_RT EXNRT
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON EXNRT.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT                           
     ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY  
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
     ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EXNRT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
     ON  EXNRT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
 INNER JOIN  (SELECT EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT2 
               WHERE ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' 
               QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ORDER BY REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)=1) NRT3
 ON EXNRT.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NRT3.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
 ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NRT3.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   WHERE EXNRT.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
  AND EXNRT.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE_ADJ'
  AND EXNRT.GL_DT  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  AND  NOT EXISTS 
                   (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR
                                                                  WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = EXNRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
                                                                  AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RTE_INV')
   AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
 WHERE DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = EXNRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
                                                                  AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RTE_INV' )

SELECT 
 WNRTC.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
 COALESCE(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
 COALESCE(WNRTC.GL_DT, WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT )  AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_RT WNRTC
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII
 ON WNRTC.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
  AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = WNRTC.ORG_ID  
 WHERE
 WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME='UNKNOWN'

SELECT
   WNRTC.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,
   WNRTC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
   COALESCE(SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID, SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID) AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
   COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
   WNRTC.ACCTD_AMOUNT     AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
   'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
   NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
   NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
   NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
   WNRTC.AMOUNT      AS AMOUNT,
   1 AS BATCH_ID,
   NULL        AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
   NULL        AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
   WNRTC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    as CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
   NULL        AS COGS_PERCENT,
   NULL        AS COMMENTS,
   WNRTC.CONTEXT       AS CONTEXT,
   current_timestamp(0)     as CREATE_DATETIME,
   1         as CREATED_BY,
   current_timestamp(0)     AS CREATION_DATE,
    -9999 AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
   NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT      AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   '=' AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
   NULL         AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
   'INV'        AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
   WNRTC.FISCAL_ID     AS FISCAL_ID,
   'F'        AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
   WNRTC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE     AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
   current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
   WNRTC.GL_DT     AS GL_DATE,
   WNRTC.GL_POSTED_DT, 
   NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    AS GLOBAL_NAME,
   NULL AS GROUPING_ID,
   NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
   WNRTC.TRXL_CURR_CODE          AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,   
   NULL       AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
   NULL        AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
   current_timestamp(0)    AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
   1       AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
   'Y'        AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
   NULL       AS LINE_PERCENT,
   ERSW.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT, 
   NULL       AS LINE_TYPE,
   NULL       AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
   SSO_DFLT_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AS  ORDER_HEADER_ID ,
   WNGL.LINE_ID  AS  ORDER_LINE_ID , 
   WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER     as ORDER_NUMBER,
   WNRTC.ORG_ID      AS ORG_ID,
   NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   'Y'        AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
   NULL        AS REASON_CODE,
   0       AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
   NULL       AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
   NULL AS REQUEST_ID,
   COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE,WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT ) AS  RULE_START_DATE,
  /* COALESCE(ERSW.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT,0)  AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,
   COALESCE(ERSW.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT,0) AS SALESREP_ID ,*/
  -999 AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,  /*Defaulting for RTE*/
  -999 AS SALESREP_ID ,
    NULL           AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
    NULL           AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
   NULL           AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
   CAST(COALESCE(ERSW.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE,'RTE_ADJ') AS VARCHAR(8)) AS SOURCE_TYPE,
   COALESCE(ERSW.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100) AS SPLIT_PERCENT,
  /* COALESCE(ERSW.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT,0) AS TERRITORY_ID,*/
  -999 AS TERRITORY_ID,
   CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE  
    THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
    END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
   'O'          AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE ,
   0 AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
   WNRTC.TRX_DATE,
   NULL       AS TRX_NAME,
  WNRTC.TRX_NUMBER,
   NULL AS TRX_TYPE,
   NULL       AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
   NULL       AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
   'RTE_INV'      AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
   WNRTC.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
   WNRTC.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   COALESCE(ERSW.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,'Direct Sales'),
   COALESCE(ERSW.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,'99998'),  
   COALESCE(ERSW.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,73106) 
    FROM 
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_RT WNRTC 
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
   ON (NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=WNRTC.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC
    ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC
    ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSOL.SS_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_GET_LINES_RT WNGL 
    ON WNRTC.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY = WNGL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACCT_RULE_RT WNGAR  
    ON WNRTC.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY = WNGAR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT
  EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
  SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD AS SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE,
  SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,
  SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
  SALES_REP_NUM AS BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY            
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX 
  ) ERSW
  ON ERSW.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WNRTC.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
    ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
    ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME        
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRTC.ITEM_KEY ) 
  
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
    ON  WNRTC.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT     
 WHERE   WNRTC.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'ERP' 
 UNION ALL
 SELECT
   WNRTC.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,
   WNRTC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
   COALESCE(SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID, SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID) AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
   COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
   WNRTC.ACCTD_AMOUNT     AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
   'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
   NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
   NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
   NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
   WNRTC.AMOUNT      AS AMOUNT,
   1 AS BATCH_ID,
   NULL        AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
   NULL        AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
   WNRTC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    as CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
   NULL        AS COGS_PERCENT,
   NULL        AS COMMENTS,
   WNRTC.CONTEXT       AS CONTEXT,
   current_timestamp(0)     as CREATE_DATETIME,
   1         as CREATED_BY,
   current_timestamp(0)     AS CREATION_DATE,
    -9999 AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
   NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT      AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   '=' AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
   NULL         AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
   'INV'        AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
   WNRTC.FISCAL_ID     AS FISCAL_ID,
   'F'        AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
   WNRTC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE     AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
   current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
   WNRTC.GL_DT     AS GL_DATE,
   WNRTC.GL_POSTED_DT, 
   NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    AS GLOBAL_NAME,
   NULL AS GROUPING_ID,
   NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
   WNRTC.TRXL_CURR_CODE          AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,   
   NULL       AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
   NULL        AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
   current_timestamp(0)    AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
   1       AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
   'Y'        AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
   NULL       AS LINE_PERCENT,
   ERSW.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT AS  SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT, 
   NULL       AS LINE_TYPE,
   NULL       AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
   -9999 AS ORDER_HEADER_ID ,
   WNGL.LINE_ID  AS  ORDER_LINE_ID , 
   WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER     as ORDER_NUMBER,
   WNRTC.ORG_ID      AS ORG_ID,
   NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   'Y'        AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
   NULL        AS REASON_CODE,
   0       AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
   NULL       AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
   NULL AS REQUEST_ID,
   COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE,WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT ) AS  RULE_START_DATE,
  -999 AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,  /*Defaulting for RTE*/
  -999 AS SALESREP_ID ,
    NULL           AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
    NULL           AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
   NULL           AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
   CAST(COALESCE(ERSW.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE,'XAAS_ADJ') AS VARCHAR(8)) AS SOURCE_TYPE,
   COALESCE(ERSW.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100)  AS SPLIT_PERCENT,
   -999 AS TERRITORY_ID,
   CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE  
    THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
    END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
   'O'          AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE ,
   0 AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
   WNRTC.TRX_DATE,
   NULL       AS TRX_NAME,
  WNRTC.TRX_NUMBER,
   NULL AS TRX_TYPE,
   NULL       AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
   NULL       AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
   'RTE_INV'      AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
   WNRTC.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
   WNRTC.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   COALESCE(ERSW.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,'Direct Sales')AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   COALESCE(ERSW.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,'99998') AS BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   COALESCE(ERSW.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,73106)) 
    FROM 
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_RT WNRTC
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NATL.SS_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_GET_LINES_RT WNGL 
    ON WNRTC.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY = WNGL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACCT_RULE_RT WNGAR  
    ON WNRTC.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY = WNGAR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT
  EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
  SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD AS SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE,
  SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,
  SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
  SALES_REP_NUM AS BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY            
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX 
  ) ERSW
  ON ERSW.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WNRTC.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
    ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
    ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME        
   
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRTC.ITEM_KEY ) 
    LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
     ON (CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
                ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
                END=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
     LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
     ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
     LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
     ON STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2               
     ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES'))
     AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
  
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
    ON  WNRTC.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT         
    WHERE   WNRTC.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'XAAS'
